title: Quasar
description: A performance modpack created for stability.
body:
# Introducing Quasar: The Ultimate Minecraft Performance Modpack

**Quasar is engineered to be a leading performance and stability modpack for Minecraft.**

How do we achieve this? Through countless hours of meticulous testing.

Quasar is configured to deliver the smoothest and most responsive Minecraft experience possible, focusing on maximizing performance and stability.

Every release of Quasar is tested for at least 1 hour. 

---

**What you get with Quasar:**


**High Render Distance:** Easily render 60+ chunks while still keeping a playable frame rate.


**Consistent Game Performance:** Maintain a stable 20 Ticks Per Second (TPS), even under heavy load.

**Better CPU Scheduling:** Reduce lag spikes and stutters.


**Ultra-Fast World Interaction:** Rapid world loading and generation, ensuring the game keeps pace with your exploration, no matter how fast you travel.


**Swift Server Join:** Get into a server faster with significantly reduced server loading times.


**Optimized Lighting:** A smoother experience with optimised lighting updates.


**Enhanced Stability:** Includes bug fixes for a more reliable experience.


**Full Shader Support:** Compatible with all your favourite shaders!


**GPU Memory Leak Fix:** Fixes common GPU memory leaks, allowing you to play without worrying about running out of memory.

**Less Bugs:** Quasar uses mods to fix bugs and model issues, lowering the chances of weird shenanigans happening.

**Audio Engine Tweaks:** Tweaks to the audio engine to avoid it overloading.

**Quality of Life mods:** You get subtle but very useful mods.



And much more!

---

## Performance Comparison: World Generation

See how Quasar stacks up against other popular optimization solutions:

### Quasar

**Initial World Creation Time: 1.73 seconds**

**World Load Time: 1.79 seconds**


### Fabulously Optimized

Initial World Creation Time: 8.83 seconds

World Load Time: 2.39 seconds

Quasar is around 80.4% faster in world generation time compared to Fabulously Optimized, and around 25% faster in world loading time.


**Performance metrics can vary based on individual system configurations and specific game conditions.**

---

### Test System Specifications

The following hardware was used for our benchmark testing:

CPU: AMD Ryzen 5 2600

RAM: 24GB DDR4 (12GB allocated to Minecraft)

GPU: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1050 Ti

---

**Legal Information**

You may not redistribute or modify these specific configurations without explicit prior permission from the Quasar development team.

Individual Mod Licenses: Each individual mod included within the Quasar modpack remains under its original author's license. You are responsible for adhering to the terms and conditions of each of these individual licenses.
